rules.rule: supersedence MUST cite predecessor_asset_id, successor_asset_id, reason, reviewer.
predecessor MUST currently be in {publication-selected, reviewer-approved}; otherwise refused.
supersedence MUST preserve grounding_id continuity (predecessor.grounding_id == successor.grounding_id), unless reviewer explicitly authorizes a grounding-shift with attribution.
OEM source assets CANNOT be superseded by generated assets without explicit reviewer attestation and a recorded rationale.
supersedence is append-only; in-place overwrite is FORBIDDEN.
supersedence chain MUST be acyclic and traceable end-to-end.
